overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a Times Square-inspired urban canyon at sunset, featuring massive illuminated digital billboards on modern glass skyscrapers. The static elevated camera captures Spider-Man perched on a building ledge overlooking moderate traffic flowing through the multi-lane street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: Times Square-style digital billboard canyon with elevated viewing position

events.description: Spider-Man enters frame from left, crouching on building ledge
Yellow taxi and other vehicles move through the intersection below

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated perspective overlooking the urban canyon street and traffic

notable_agents.action: Spider-Man crouching on building ledge, surveying the street below
yellow taxi driving through the intersection along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: Large vertical digital billboard displaying 'BUMPY SAINTS' advertisement on left building facade
Red digital billboard with 'COLEXCO' text positioned below the Bumpy Saints screen
Massive red vertical billboard displaying 'INTENSE PERSONAL' text on right building
Tall modern glass skyscrapers receding into the golden hour sky, covered with illuminated digital displays

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view captures a vibrant Times Square-inspired urban canyon bathed in warm golden hour light. Massive digital billboards illuminate the modern glass skyscrapers on both sides, while Spider-Man crouches on the left building ledge observing the moderate traffic flow below. The scene showcases high-end game engine rendering with cinematic lighting and detailed architectural elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static elevated perspective of a vibrant urban canyon as the warm golden hour light emphasizes the scale of the city. It begins with a wide view of modern glass skyscrapers flanking a multi-lane street, where massive digital billboards cast a colorful glow over the architecture. As the camera lingers, the focus settles on Spider-Man crouching on a building ledge to the left, observing the moderate flow of traffic below. The scene remains poised in this cinematic composition, highlighting the detailed rendering of the city's illuminated surfaces and the atmospheric sunset lighting.
